name: Kiwi
benefit_user: They’re running this offer for a limited time. Use my code *EV6F66* and grab your *₹100 reward* before it ends 👇
benefit_owner: I get ₹1500 cashback directly to my bank account.
pros: Earn assured rewards (Kiwi Points) on every UPI transaction made via RuPay Credit Card.
Lifetime free Axis Bank RuPay Credit Card with seamless, instant digital issuance.
Direct and hassle-free cashback redemption straight to your linked bank account.
User-friendly interface that combines the speed of UPI with the benefits of credit cards.
cons: Card approval and limit are highly dependent on credit history and bureau scores.
Reward rates and promotional offers are subject to periodic revisions by the partner bank.
steps: Download the Kiwi app from the Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
Open the app and enter your mobile number (ensure it is the one linked to your bank account and Aadhaar).
During the registration flow, look for the 'Referral Code' option and enter EV6F66 to unlock your ₹100 bonus.
Complete your KYC process to apply for the lifetime-free Kiwi Axis Bank RuPay Credit Card.
Once your virtual card is generated, link it to your UPI ID within the app.
Make your first UPI transaction of any amount using the Kiwi app to claim your ₹100 reward.

faq.question: What is the Kiwi referral code and what benefit does it offer?
faq.answer: The official Kiwi referral code is EV6F66. By entering this code during registration and completing your first transaction, you will receive a ₹100 cash bonus credited directly to your account.

faq.question: Are there any annual fees for the Kiwi Axis Bank Credit Card?
faq.answer: No, the Kiwi Axis Bank RuPay Credit Card is issued as a lifetime free card, meaning there are absolutely no joining fees or annual renewal charges.

faq.question: How do I redeem my Kiwi reward points?
faq.answer: Kiwi rewards (called Kiwis) can be redeemed directly within the app. 4 Kiwi points equal ₹1, and they can be instantly transferred as real cash into your linked savings bank account.

detailed_review:
Introduction to Kiwi: Revolutionizing UPI Payments with Credit Cards

Kiwi is a trailblazing fintech platform in India that has redefined how consumers look at daily transactions. By seamlessly merging the convenience of UPI with the financial leverage of credit cards, Kiwi allows users to make routine payments while earning significant rewards. In partnership with Axis Bank, Kiwi offers a virtual RuPay credit card that integrates directly into the UPI ecosystem, making card-based UPI payments faster and more rewarding than ever before.

Why Users Love the Kiwi App

The primary appeal of Kiwi lies in its ability to reward users for transactions that typically earn nothing on standard UPI apps. Here is why it has quickly become a favorite among personal finance enthusiasts:

  • UPI on Credit Card: You no longer need to carry physical cards. Just scan any UPI QR code and pay using your pre-approved Kiwi Axis Credit Card.
  • Real Cashback: Every payment earns you 'Kiwis' (reward points) that can be instantly converted into cash and transferred directly to your bank account.
  • Zero Hidden Fees: The virtual credit card is issued with lifetime free benefits, meaning no annual or joining fees to worry about.

How to Maximize Your Sign-Up Bonus and Rewards

To kickstart your journey, Kiwi is running a limited-time promotional offer. By using the referral code EV6F66 during sign-up, you will instantly qualify for a ₹100 cash reward. To maximize this, make sure to complete your first UPI transaction immediately after your card is issued. Additionally, route your daily micro-transactions—like groceries, tea stalls, and fuel—through Kiwi to consistently accumulate reward points and watch your savings grow effortlessly.
